positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a crescent moon nestled among bioluminescent forest flora. The design features clean silhouettes of oversized fern leaves, delicate spiderwebs catching dew, and soft-glowing geometric abstract elements. The color palette is deep indigo, emerald green, sapphire blue, and subtle pops of ethereal lavender. The composition is centrally focused, designed for high contrast on fabric, utilizing negative space effectively. Studio photography style, vector illustration quality, dramatic rim lighting, high detail, perfect for textile printing.
negative: blur, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, grain, artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noise, messy lines, cartoon, photorealism, dirty, scribble
